principles: Data is Art: Stats should look like a HUD, not a spreadsheet.
Neon on Black: Use high contrast to make data pop against deep backgrounds.
Gamified Action: Every bet, prediction, or comment should feel like a game move.
Tactile Depth: Use glassmorphism and subtle borders to create layers.

bento_grid.description: Use for Match Details. Pitch in center (col-span-2 row-span-2), Stats on sides.

dense_list.description: Use for Leaderboards and Match Lists. High density, low vertical padding.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-primary/90 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(57,255,20,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-sm skew-x-[-10deg]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-medium hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/40 transition-all rounded-sm

cards.base: bg-surface border border-white/5 rounded-xl overflow-hidden relative

inputs.base: bg-black/50 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 text-white placeholder:text-gray-600 rounded-md

visual_enhancers.scanline: background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255,255,255,0), rgba(255,255,255,0) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2)); background-size: 100% 4px;

assets_instructions.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for UI icons (Menu, User, Settings). Use 'react-icons/fa6' (FontAwesome 6) for Football specific icons (FaFutbol, FaTshirt, FaStopwatch).
assets_instructions.charts: Use 'recharts'. Style Axis and Grid lines with stroke='#333'. Tooltips must be dark with neon borders.
assets_instructions.pitch_viz: Build a custom React component using CSS Grid or SVG. Do not use an image for the pitch. Draw lines with CSS borders.

universal_guidelines: Dark Mode Default: The app is dark mode ONLY. Do not implement a light mode toggle.
No Gradients on Text: Keep text solid white or grey for readability. Use gradients on borders or backgrounds only.
Data-Testid: All interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute.
Mobile First: Ensure the pitch visualization scales down to mobile width (use aspect-ratio).
Gamification: Use 'XP' and 'Level' badges prominently in the User Dashboard.
Betting: Use 'Odds' display (e.g., 2.50) in Mono font for clarity.
